title: Rebellion
questions: Do people in your country often hold marches and demonstrations? Why/not?
Have you ever been on a march or attended a demonstration? What was it about?
Do you think people should have the right to organise marches and hold demonstrations? Why/not?
Have there been any riots in your country recently? What were they about? Was the problem resolved?
How do you think governments should deal with riots?
What do you think are the most famous revolutions in history? What did they achieve?
Do riots, rebellions, etc. ever achieve any real change?
Which famous figures have been assassinated in your lifetime?
Do you think anything has changed in the world as a result of these assassinations?
What famous historical assassinations do you know about? Did any of them change the course of history, in your opinion?
Do you think assassination can ever be justified?
If you were sent back in time to assassinate somebody, who would it be?
What precautions can high-profile politicians and monarchs etc. take to avoid being assassinated?
